📥 Import Shapefile

      

        Drop a .zip bundle of shapefiles. Boundary import is live; sample-point import coming next.
      

      

        
1 · Upload

        
2 · Review Layers

        
3 · Map Attributes

        
4 · Confirm Features

        
5 · Import

      


      
      

        

          
          
📦

          
Drop your shapefile zip here, or click to browse

          
Accepts .zip bundles · all parsing happens locally in your browser

        

        

      


      
      

        

          
Found layers in your file

          

        

        

          
← Start over

🧪 Import Soil Samples

      

        Drop a sample shapefile .zip (point or polygon-cell). Samples are auto-matched to your existing field boundaries.
      

      

        
1 · Upload

        
2 · Review Layers

        
3 · Map Analytes

        
4 · Preview Matching

        
5 · Import

      


      
      

        

          
          
🧪

          
Drop your soil sample shapefile zip, or click to browse

          
Accepts .zip bundles · auto-detects point or polygon-cell format

        

        

      


      
      

        

          
Found sample layers

          

        

        

          
← Start over

          
        

      


      
      

        

        

          
← Back to layers

          
        

      


      
      

        

        

          
← Back to mapping

          
        

      


      
      

        

          
Importing...

          

        

      

    


    
    

      
📊 Import Lab Results

      

        Drop a Midwest Labs .txt result file. Each row will be matched to an existing soil sample by sample ID, and lab values (P, K, pH, OM, CEC, Ca, Mg, S, %Ca, etc.) will be attached.
      

      

        
Step 1 — Drop file

        

          
          
📄

          
Drop a Midwest Labs result file (.txt or .csv), or click to browse

          
No header row · 54 columns · sample ID is in column 6

        

        

      

      

        
Step 2 — Pick the field these samples belong to

        

          

          

            
            
          

          

        

        

          
          
        

      

      

        
Step 3 — Import progress

        

        

          
          
        

      

    


    
    

      

        

          
⚠️ Review Unmatched Samples

          
Samples that didn't auto-match to a field. Click a checkbox to zoom to it and assign it, or use bulk-assign.

        

        
      

      

    


    
    

      
      

        

          
🧪 Edit Sample Points

          
Drag points to move · click map to add · click point to delete

        

        

          
          
          
        

      

      
      

      
      

        Click the map to add a point · drag any point to move it · click a point then Delete to remove it
        
      

    


    
    

      

        

          
Digitize Field Boundary

          
Click on the map to start placing vertices · click the first vertex (or hit Finish) to close the polygon

        

        

          
          
          
          
        

      

      

      

        Search a location with the map controls (zoom, pan), then click to place vertices.
        
          
        
      

    


    
    

      
      

        

          
Soil Surface

          
Interpolated values from soil sample points (IDW)

        

        

          
          

            
            
          

          
          
          
          
          
          
        

      

      
      

        

        
        
        
        
        
      

      
      

        

        

      

      

        Pick an analyte to render its surface.
      

    


    
    

      

        
📖 Mapbook

        
Generate a multi-page PDF with cover, sample locations, soil-surface pages (one per analyte with data), recommendation pages, and product summary.

      

      

        
Loading…

      

    


    
    

      

        
📤 Export Variable Rate Prescriptions

        
Pick a field and a work order, then generate shapefile prescriptions for AgLeader / Raven / John Deere displays.

      

      

        
Loading…

      

    


    
    

      

        
⚙️ Settings

        
Org-wide preferences. Saved to Supabase. Affects new and re-generated recs.

      

      

        
Loading settings…

      

    


    
    

      

        

          
👥 Users

          
Manage who has access to AgriMax and what they can do.

        

        
      

      

        

          
Org OwnerFull access — all retailers, all data, all settings.

          
Retailer AdminManages one retail location — growers, fields, work orders.

          
AgronomistSamples, imports, recs — no billing or settings.

          
GrowerRead-only portal — their fields, samples, and recs only.

        

      

      

        
Loading users…

📋 New Work Order

        
Fill out everything for one field. Use Save & Duplicate if sampling more fields.

      

      
    

    

      

        
Field

        

          
          
          

            + Create new grower
          

          

            
            
            

              
              
            

          

        

        

          
          
          

            + Create new farm
          

          

            
            

              
              
            

          

        

        

          
          
          

            

              
            

            

            
0 fields selected

          

          

            + Create new field
          

          

            
            
            

              
              
            

            
Note: this creates the field with no boundary. Add the boundary later via Import Shapefile or Digitize Boundary.

Products & Rates

        

          For each nutrient, pick the product to apply and (optionally) cap the per-acre rate range. The rec engine respects these min/max bounds when generating prescriptions.

📥 Replace Boundary from Shapefile

        
Drop a more accurate shapefile to replace the current boundary.

      

      
    

    

      

        

          
          
📦

          
Drop your replacement shapefile zip, or click to browse

          
If multiple polygons are found, you'll be asked to pick one (or merge)

        

        

      

      

        

          Preview: green = current boundary, yellow = new from shapefile.
          
        

        

        

      

    

    

      
      

        
        
      

    

  







  

    

      

        
🔀 Merge Duplicate Fields

        
Combine two field records into one. Samples, work orders, and recs from the "loser" move to the "winner", then the loser is deleted.

      

      
    

    

      
      

        

          The winner is the field you started from. Pick another field below to merge INTO this one. The loser will be deleted after its data moves over.
        

        

        
        
        

      

    

    

      
      

        
        
      

    

  







  

    

      

        
🗑 Delete All Samples

        
This permanently removes all samples and their lab results from this field.

      

      
    

    

      

        This cannot be undone. The field record itself stays. All sample point locations and every lab analyte value on those samples will be deleted.
      

      

      

        To confirm, type the field name  below:
      

      
    

    

      
      

        
        
      

    

  







  

    

      

        
👤 Invite User

        
New users receive an email invitation to set their password.

      

      
    

    

      

        
        
        

      

      

        
        
      

      

        
        
        
This user will only see data under this retailer.

      

      

        
        
        
This user will only see their own fields, samples, and recs.

      

      

        ℹ️ Editing an existing user updates their role and assignments. To change their email or reset their password, use the Supabase dashboard.
      

      

        ⚠️ Org Owners have unrestricted access to all data, settings, and users. Only assign this role to trusted administrators.
      

    

    

      

      

        
        
      

    

  







  

    

      

        
✏️ New Field — Digitize Boundary

        
Where does this field belong? You'll draw the boundary on the map next.

      

      
    

    

      

        
        
      

      

        
        
      

      

        
        
      

      

        
        
      

    

    

      Fill all fields, then start drawing.

📤 Export Variable Rate Prescriptions

        
Generate shapefile prescriptions from this WO's saved rec runs for upload to your monitor.

      

      
    

    

      


      

        
        

          
          
          
        

      


      

        
        

      


      

        Advanced options
        

          

            
            
          

          

            
            
          

        

      


      

        📦 Exports a single ZIP containing one subfolder per crop scenario (e.g. Corn_150/, Soybeans_60/). Each folder has the shapefile set + summary .txt for every product in that scenario. One click — done.
      


      

    

    

      
Files include WGS84 projection (.prj). Coordinate system: EPSG:4326.
